---
title: "Teaching"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

::: {.teaching-block}
::: {.institution-label}
Drexel University · Dornsife School of Public Health
:::

::: {.course-entry}
::: {.course-code}
EOH 812
:::
::: {.course-title}
Environmental Exposure Sciences
:::
::: {.course-role}
Co-Instructor · Spring 2024
:::
:::

::: {.course-entry}
::: {.course-code}
EOH 812
:::
::: {.course-title}
Environmental Exposure Sciences
:::
::: {.course-role}
Teaching Assistant · Spring 2023
:::
:::
:::

::: {.teaching-block}
::: {.institution-label}
Columbia University · Mailman School of Public Health
:::

::: {.course-entry}
::: {.course-code}
P8371
:::
::: {.course-title}
Public Health GIS
:::
::: {.course-role}
Teaching Assistant · Spring 2020
:::
:::

::: {.course-entry}
::: {.course-code}
PUBHG 4200
:::
::: {.course-title}
Environment, Health, and Justice: Concepts and Practice
:::
::: {.course-role}
Teaching Assistant & Course Developer · Fall 2019
:::
:::
:::
